data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding eligibility filters.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of eligibility filters by resource type, capability, location, and custom subject. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of these filters. The prior steps focus on creating offers and bookings but do not include any checks or records related to eligibility filters, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of eligibility filters by resource type/capability/location/custom subject.
